# tcg-sandbox_game (Resource)

Manages a game in TCG Sandbox.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `attributes` (Map of String) A map of attribute names to their types ('string', 'number', or 'boolean'). Changing this requires replacing the resource.
- `banner_image_path` (String) Path to a local image file to use as the banner image. The file will be read and sent as a base64 data URL.
- `banner_vertical_alignment` (Number) Banner vertical alignment value.
- `description` (String) The description of the game.
- `name` (String) The name of the game.

### Optional

- `game_play_data` (Block, Optional) The grid configuration and player count settings for the game board layout. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--game_play_data))
- `options` (Block, Optional) Configuration options for how the game displays cards and other elements. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--options))
- `rules` (Block, Optional) Game rules in markdown format. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--rules))

### Read-Only

- `banner_image_public_url` (String) The public URL of the banner image after upload.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the game.
- `owner` (String) The user ID of the game owner.
- `playable` (Boolean) Whether the game is ready to be played.

<a id="nestedblock--game_play_data"></a>
### Nested Schema for `game_play_data`

Optional:

- `player_count` (Number) The number of players for the game (1-4).
- `slots` (Attributes List) Array of grid slots defining the game board layout. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--game_play_data--slots))

<a id="nestedatt--game_play_data--slots"></a>
### Nested Schema for `game_play_data.slots`

Required:

- `column` (Number) The column position of the slot in the grid (0-based index).
- `height` (Number) The height of the slot in grid units (how many rows it spans).
- `max_count` (Number) The maximum number of items this slot can hold.
- `row` (Number) The row position of the slot in the grid (0-based index).
- `type` (String) The type of content the slot holds ('cards' or 'counters').
- `visibility` (String) Whether the slot is visible to all players ('public') or only its owner ('private').
- `width` (Number) The width of the slot in grid units (how many columns it spans).

Optional:

- `player_owner` (Number) The player number (1-based) who owns this slot, or null if unowned.



<a id="nestedblock--options"></a>
### Nested Schema for `options`

Optional:

- `card_display_context` (String) Controls where the display mode applies ('everywhere' or 'ingameonly').
- `card_display_mode` (String) Controls how cards are displayed ('managed' or 'imageonly').


<a id="nestedblock--rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules`

Optional:

- `content` (String) Markdown content for the game rules.
